redaction_policy: No applicant, property, account, contact, project, credential, browser, payment-card, or portal-state values are present.

records.subject: applicant
records.requirement_text: Use the FCC wireless application path only when the proposed work is a wireless facility application handled through PP&D or DevHub guidance for that request type.

evidence.source_title: Apply for a permit or request online through Development Hub PDX
evidence.source_detail: Public DevHub application guidance lists FCC wireless applications among request types available through the online permitting flow.

records.subject: applicant
records.object: plan-review submittal package when required by PP&D review
records.requirement_text: Treat the FCC wireless application as a request that may require PP&D review before issuance; the applicant should preserve a plan-review checkpoint until PP&D guidance or staff review confirms the exact review path.

evidence.source_title: Apply for a permit or request online through Development Hub PDX
evidence.source_detail: The public application guidance separates online request types and includes request flows that require review before permit issuance.
Public DevHub help describes permit requests requiring plan review as a supported service category.

records.subject: applicant
records.object: application materials and supporting documents requested for review
records.requirement_text: Upload the application materials and supporting documents requested for the FCC wireless application; keep drawings, application forms, calculations, and supporting documents separated when the public guidance calls for separate PDF groups.

evidence.source_title: Apply for a permit or request online through Development Hub PDX
evidence.source_detail: Public DevHub application guidance identifies online request submission and document upload as part of supported application workflows.
Public PP&D guidance says drawing plans may be one searchable PDF while applications, calculations, and supporting documents are separate PDFs when the Single PDF Process applies.

records.subject: agent
records.requirement_text: Fees may be presented after intake, review, or another PP&D checkpoint; an automated assistant may summarize the payment checkpoint but must not enter payment details or pay fees without exact user approval for that payment action.

evidence.source_detail: Public DevHub FAQ lists fee payments as a supported service category.

evidence.source_title: Apply for a permit or request online through Development Hub PDX
evidence.source_detail: Public DevHub application guidance routes online permit and request workflows through DevHub, where payment checkpoints can appear for applicable services.

records.subject: applicant
records.object: PP&D correction requests and revised documents
records.requirement_text: When PP&D issues corrections or checksheets for the FCC wireless application, the applicant must provide revised materials through the correction upload path identified by DevHub or PP&D guidance.

evidence.source_detail: Public DevHub FAQ lists correction uploads as a supported service category.

records.subject: applicant
records.object: applicable final review, issuance, and inspection or closeout steps
records.requirement_text: After review approval, follow PP&D or DevHub closeout instructions for permit issuance, finalization, and any applicable inspection scheduling or completion steps before treating the request as complete.

evidence.source_detail: Public DevHub FAQ lists inspection scheduling for online trade permits and permit workflow support as service categories; finalization remains a PP&D process checkpoint for applicable permits.

evidence.source_title: Apply for a permit or request online through Development Hub PDX
evidence.source_detail: Public DevHub application guidance identifies DevHub as the online system for permit and request workflows, including post-submittal status handling.

records.subject: agent
records.object: official submit, certify, correction upload, inspection scheduling, cancellation, or payment action
records.requirement_text: An automated assistant may prepare a preview for an FCC wireless application, but must pause before official submission, certification, correction upload, inspection scheduling, cancellation, or payment until the user gives exact approval for that action.

evidence.source_detail: Public DevHub help identifies uploads, fee payments, and other permit workflow actions as portal services with practical consequences for the applicant.

evidence.source_title: Apply for a permit or request online through Development Hub PDX
evidence.source_detail: Public DevHub application guidance places FCC wireless applications in the online request workflow, so consequential workflow actions require user-controlled confirmation gates.
